title: Comfy Sky
description: make ilmango sky block much more easier
body:
## Installation Requirements
Comfy Sky Mod runs on **Fabric** only. To get extraordinary sky blocks experience, these mods are required to install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [Carpet Sky Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-sky-additions) [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) We have list some of the optional mods and mod packs you can download as well in our wiki page. [Comfy Sky Wiki Download](https://wzsjc2020.github.io/Wiki_Test_Only/#!common/downloads/root.md) ​ ## About Welcome to Comfy Sky, a mod made for [Carpet Sky Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-sky-additions) (also known as ilmango sky blocks). If you stuck at the beginning of the Carpet Sky Additions, this mod is worth trying. ​ In Comfy Sky, you will experience a comfort start. More utilities are added into games, which are really helpful. Our unique digging system allows you find extra loot items in shovelable blocks. A clear advancement system with more than 30 advancements will guide you through early stage of game smoothly. ​ We have powerful wiki system, however it only supports Chinese Simplify right now. But you can still use Google Translate to understand most of the contents.[Comfy Sky Wiki](https://wzsjc2020.github.io/Wiki_Test_Only/#!index.md) ​ The **Ultimate Goal of Comfy Sky** is to trade emerald with a villager, and enjoy the rest of journey. ​ **Important**: In order to be able to see all recipes required in Comfy Sky, consider installing a Recipe Viewer mod. Comfy Sky has full support for [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) since version 17.1.8. ​ ## Wiki Links ### Carpet Sky Additions [Carpet Sky Additions Wiki on Github](https://github.com/jsorrell/CarpetSkyAdditions/blob/1.20/README.md) ### Minecraft [Official Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki) ### Comfy Sky [Comfy Sky Wiki on Github](https://wzsjc2020.github.io/Wiki_Test_Only/#!index.md) ​ ## Development Find out all resources we used for creating this mod on our wiki.[Comfy Sky Wiki Credit](https://wzsjc2020.github.io/Wiki_Test_Only/#!common/credits/root.md) ### Code WZSJC2026 ### Art WZSJC2026 ### Wiki Development WZSJC2026 ​ ## Localization - en_us (English US) - zh_cn (Chinese) ​ ## Report Errors Report issues on Github, and pls attach a crush report or other texts which can help me quickly target problems.
